/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libmavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/mavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/mavivatan_interfaces/msg/ida_durum__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/baris/mavivatan_ws/build/mavivatan_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmavivatan_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
